ham.subject: Company Leave Policy Update – Please Review
ham.body:
Hi Team,

I hope you are all doing well. We have updated the company leave policy effective from 1st May 2024. Please find the key changes below:

1. Annual leave entitlement increased by 2 days for all employees.
2. Introduction of a flexible leave option for remote workers.
3. Updated procedure for requesting emergency leave.
4. Clarification on carry‑over limits for unused leave.

Please review the attached policy document and confirm receipt by replying to this email. If you have any questions or need clarification, feel free to reach out to HR.

Thank you for your attention.

Regards,
HR Team

spam.subject: Urgent: Immediate Payroll Update Required – Action Needed
spam.body:
Dear [Employee Name],

Kripya dhyan dein! Humari payroll team ne notice kiya hai ki aapki recent salary deduction pending hai due to incomplete bank details. As per company policy, aapko apni bank account information verify karni hogi within the next 48 hours to avoid delay in your upcoming salary. 

Please click the link below to confirm your bank details:
<URL>

If you do not update by the deadline, a delay in your salary payout may occur. This is a mandatory step for all employees. We appreciate your prompt action.

Thank you,
HR Payroll Department
